feat.name: Grave Threat
feat.text: You use your imposing demeanor to set up the undead for defeat. Make a Strike against an undead creature using a weapon with which you have master proficiency. If you hit, all Strikes against that creature gain the benefits of Reaper of Repose for 1 round.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
